description: Style Note Carrying around a trendy and fashionable bag is not just about completing your outfit, you can also use your bag to make a style statement. This super cool and colourful choice from nike is a must have for your summer and monsoon collection. In evergreen black, you can pair the bag with bright summery colours and match your shoes and accessories with your bag. Product Details A black, half moon shaped, sling bag One adjustable fabric sling to wear it across your shoulders or swing it one side One main compartment with an internal zipped pocket and nylon lining One zipped pocket in front with a pink Nike swoosh Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 25 cm Width: 43 cm Depth: 3.5 cm
